items.question: How much can I earn from micro tasks?
items.answer: Earnings vary by task type. Simple tasks pay $0.01-$2 each. Complex tasks like transcription pay $5-$50. Most members earn $100-$500 per month, but active workers earn $1000+ by completing hundreds of tasks daily.

items.question: Is it really free to join?
items.answer: Yes! Cashog is 100% free to join. You never need to pay anything. Just complete tasks and get paid.

items.question: How do I get paid for completing tasks?
items.answer: You can cash out via PayPal, bank transfer, Bitcoin, Ethereum, or gift cards (Amazon, Apple, Google Play, Robux, Steam, Xbox, PlayStation). Minimum payout is just $5.

items.question: Do I need special skills for micro tasks?
items.answer: No! Most tasks require no special skills. Data entry, image tagging, and captcha solving are easy for anyone. Some tasks like transcription may require basic English skills.

items.question: How long does each task take?
items.answer: Tasks range from 10 seconds to 30 minutes. Simple tasks like captcha solving take 5-10 seconds. Complex tasks like transcription take 15-30 minutes. You can choose tasks that fit your available time.

items.question: Is Cashog available in my country?
items.answer: Cashog is available in over 50 countries including the US, Canada, UK, Australia, India, Philippines, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, and many more. Sign up for free to check micro task availability in {country}.
